# Everything in Perspective - AI LLM Discovery

> A magazine exploring trends and global topics with depth, nuance, and historical context.

Canonical Origin: https://everythinginperspective.github.io

## LLM Resources

- [Full Content](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/llms-full.txt)
  Complete page content in markdown format.
- [Sitemap](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/sitemap.xml)
  XML sitemap for search engines and crawlers.
- [Robots.txt](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/robots.txt)
  Crawler rules and permissions.

## Content Collections

- [Articles](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/)
  Essays exploring trends and topics
- [Perspectives](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/perspectives/)
  In-depth perspectives on global issues
- [Books](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/books/)
  Recommended reading and book reviews
- [Pages](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/pages/)
  Static content pages
